tenant.whatsapp.settings.title: Settings
tenant.whatsapp.settings.error.try_again: Please try again in a few moments.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.toast.connect_r: Connection is starting. Service is temporarily unreachable, UI will keep syncing from database.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.lifecycle.jid_c: Number already connected in another tenant
Disconnected due to duplicate number cleanup
tenant.whatsapp.settings.alert.jid_confl: This session was disconnected because number {{jid}} is already active in tenant #{{owner_tenant_id}}.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.remove_confirm_: This will revoke the server session and remove local auth cache. You will need to scan QR again to reconnect.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.qr_info: QR handshake runs from the wwebjs service. When status is connecting, open the service panel and scan the latest QR.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.realtime_unavai: Realtime websocket is not active yet. Fill Pusher configuration so QR/status updates push automatically without refresh.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.qr_empty: QR not available yet. Click Connect to generate a new QR.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.qr_expired: QR expired, click Connect to generate a new one.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.command_guide_i: Incoming messages that start with / or ! will be treated as bot commands.
tenant.whatsapp.settings.command_ping_de: Check whether bot auto-reply is active. Response: Pong!
tenant.whatsapp.settings.command_help_de: Show available commands and short descriptions.
tenant.whatsapp.chats.title: Chat
tenant.whatsapp.chats.error.try_again: Please try again in a few moments.
tenant.whatsapp.chats.actions.archive_in: Archive action is not available in this phase.
tenant.whatsapp.chats.actions.mute_info: Mute action is not available in this phase.
tenant.whatsapp.chats.actions.clear_info: Clear conversation is not available in this phase.
tenant.whatsapp.chats.actions.export_inf: Export is not available in this phase.
